name: pulse-terminal
description: Live crypto macro + derivatives intelligence — overview, stablecoins, ETFs, perp futures, DEX volume, TVL, funding rates, open interest, and cross-source anomaly detection.
long_description: Exposes 10 read-only MCP tools that pull real-time crypto market and derivatives data so Claude can analyse fund flows + leverage without an API key on the model side. Sources: CoinGecko (overview), DefiLlama (stablecoins / DEX / TVL), Binance/Bybit/OKX public endpoints (funding, OI, futures), alternative.me (Fear & Greed), Farside (real spot ETF flows). Optional COINGLASS_API_KEY swaps Farside for Coinglass since-inception cumulatives.

tools.name: get_market_overview
tools.description: Total mcap, BTC/ETH dominance, F&G, DeFi TVL

tools.name: get_etf_flows
tools.description: BTC/ETH spot ETF daily flows + cumulative

tools.name: get_futures
tools.description: Binance perp OI, funding, L/S, price (BTC/ETH)

coinglass_api_key.title: Coinglass API key (optional)
coinglass_api_key.description: Optional. Replaces Farside ETF data with Coinglass since-inception cumulative. Leave blank — Farside (free) is fine.
